description: Explicit TBD detection: document contains literal 'TBD' for SLA and response time fields

input.query: What is the SLA for the API?

description: Vague TBD detection: LLM-as-judge flags 'performance should be good' and 'security will be handled properly' as Level 2

input.query: What are the performance and security requirements?

description: Oversized file: document > 10 MB must return HTTP 422 with MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB error
Unsupported file extension (.png) must return HTTP 422
Valid PDF ingestion: document status becomes ingested and ChromaDB collection has >= 1 chunk
Groundedness check: LLM response about uptime requirement is fully supported by retrieved context

input.query: What is the system uptime requirement?

description: Query rewriting: 3 sub-queries generated internally for a single user query

input.query: What are the security and authentication requirements?

description: Proposal completeness: generated proposal scores >= 0.75 on DeepEval G-Eval rubric
Tech stack suggestion: every suggested technology exists in approved_technologies table
Tech stack rationale quality: DeepEval G-Eval scores rationale >= 0.70 and rationale references employee skills
Phase ordering compliance: Phase 3 start blocked with HTTP 409 when Phase 2 is still in_progress
Effort estimate plausibility: total_weeks is within 3x of nearest comparable historical project
Loop safety: LangGraph effort estimation agent completes within max_tool_iterations
GitHub ticket structure: epics map to Milestones, tasks map to Issues with 'task' label and milestone_number
Round-trip sync: document upload through to GitHub sync produces epics with milestone numbers and tasks with issue numbers
